title: SnapVault
description: A cross-platform app that turns a raw Snapchat data export into an organized, deduplicated media library. Rebuilds Snapchat's photo/video overlays into single files.
achievements: Built a zip-import pipeline that parses Snapchat's multi-file export format, correlates JSON/HTML metadata, and reconstructs GPS and timestamp data per file
Implemented hardware-accelerated video encoding, falling back to software encoding when unavailable
Set up CI that builds native macOS, Windows, and Linux installers on every push to main

title: Naj-Dev Portfolio Website
description: A modern portfolio website showcasing my projects, skills, and experience, built using Next.js and other technologies.
achievements: Designed a visually appealing and responsive user interface.
Showcased a dynamic project list with support for embedded videos and images.
additionalNotes: Future plans include integrating the T3 stack for backend support, user interactions, and advanced animations leveraging server-side rendering for enhanced performance.

title: JPMorgan Chase — Mobile Development Intern
description: Working on the Chase Android app — used by 70M+ customers — self-teaching Jetpack Compose and MVVM patterns.
achievements: Self-taught Jetpack Compose and MVVM patterns to accelerate onboarding and contribute to the Chase Android app used by 70M+ users.
Worked on features as well as defects on their scrum team, gaining experience in Android development, code reviews, and agile practices.
Created a playground application to help onboard new developers to Chase's Android app codebase, demonstrating best practices and common patterns.

title: JPMC Global Hackathon — Internal Mobility Assistant (1st Place, Columbus)
description: Built an internal mobility assistant to help JPMorgan Chase employees discover and transition into better-aligned roles.
achievements: Won 1st place out of 64 teams at the Columbus division of JPMorgan Chase's 10th Annual Global Hackathon.
Built a backend system using NLP techniques to compare user resumes against job descriptions, scoring overlap to surface best-fit internal roles.
Collaborated across frontend, backend, and agentic AI teams to deliver a chatbot-driven platform with role-matching logic and automated outreach workflows.
additionalNotes: Built during JPMC's 10th Annual Global Hackathon. The Columbus division had 64 competing teams.

title: JPMorgan Chase — Full Stack Web Development Intern
description: Modernized an internal financial tool's UI for 1000+ global legal entities, transitioning from a legacy JSP application to a responsive React app.
achievements: Pioneered the modernization of an internal financial tool's UI, transitioning from an outdated JSP application to a responsive React frontend designed to reduce task time by up to 50% for 1000+ global legal entities.
Worked independently on the UI/UX redesign in Columbus while coordinating closely with an international team of developers, designers, and managers using Jira.
Modularized the new frontend using a microfrontend architecture and existing APIs, enabling partial integration with the legacy system and comprehensive testing with Jest and Webpack.
additionalNotes: Strong focus on independent development, cross-timezone communication, and unit testing discipline.

title: Breakout Simulation Labs
description: A multi-part lab series for creating and enhancing a Breakout game simulation.
achievements: Built a foundational game simulation in Lab 2 with single ball, paddle, and block mechanics.
Extended functionality in Lab 3 to support multiple objects, scoring, and linked list integration.
Developed custom linked list functions in Lab 4, including `insert`, `deleteSome`, `iterate`, and `sort`.
Implemented advanced memory management techniques to handle allocation failures gracefully.
Enhanced game mechanics with paddle deflection, bonus modes, and optimized output.

title: Jump The Broom Books Website
description: A responsive website for Jump The Broom Books, showcasing its offerings and providing an online presence.
achievements: Created a user-friendly website to enhance visibility and engagement with their book catalog.
Ensured responsive design across devices.
Reached tens of thousands of free ebook downloads on the Amazon Kindle store.
imageDescription: Jump The Broom Books Website Screenshot

title: Next.js Lightweight CMS
description: A lightweight CMS built with Next.js for dynamic content management, designed for portfolio projects and small-scale websites.
achievements: Integrated rich-text editing and Markdown support for posts.
Designed a modular architecture to support scalability across different applications.
Planned for dynamic content management via a headless CMS setup.
additionalNotes: This project will serve as the foundation for several portfolio pieces, including a new iteration of M.C. Jeter's site.

title: AI-Powered Playlist Generator
description: A machine learning project designed to analyze Last.fm data and generate 20-song playlists based on user preferences and song similarities.
achievements: Developed a pipeline to fetch and process user listening data from the Last.fm API.
Designed an intuitive interface for generating and exporting playlists.
additionalNotes: This project did eventually pivot and turn into the beetjuice project.

title: ECE 2360 Final Project
description: Temperature-activated lamp with RGB LED, LCD, and buzzer functionality.
achievements: Combined sensors and microcontroller programming to create a cohesive hardware project
Resolved hardware and software troubleshooting challenges
additionalNotes: Learned new hardware components and applied GitHub for collaboration.

title: JPMC Code for Good - CTRL-R (1st Place, Pyramid CDC)
description: A digital literacy platform built in 24 hours for Pyramid CDC, a Columbus non-profit improving digital access in underserved Ohio communities.
achievements: Awarded challenge winner for Pyramid CDC at the JPMorgan Chase Code for Good Hackathon, competing to improve digital literacy for 1000+ Ohio residents.
Developed personalized course paths with gamification mechanics to boost engagement and retention.
Specialized in configuring the Firebase store and authentication, integrating it into the full codebase.
Collaborated with a cross-functional team to ship a fully functional, user-friendly platform in 24 hours.

title: M.C. Jeter's Website
description: A portfolio website for M.C. Jeter showcasing her authorial works.
achievements: Faster load times with a revamped design
Estimated 25% uplift in sales and social media interactions

title: HDNCHQ Server Management
description: Managed and optimized a personal server for hosting media and productivity tools.
achievements: Improved server uptime from ~40% to 95%
Sextupled server performance with better resource allocation and hardware upgrades
additionalNotes: Showcased advanced configuration skills and self-hosting expertise.
imageDescription: HDNCHQ Server with side panel removed.

title: Naj's PCs
description: A series of custom PC builds designed for resale, personal use, and clients, focusing on gaming, productivity, and server applications.
achievements: Delivered high-performance gaming PCs and silent, efficient servers tailored to client needs.
Optimized hardware configurations for reliability and maximum efficiency.
Successfully debugged and resolved compatibility issues in complex builds.
Configured operating systems, software, and drivers for smooth user experiences.
imageDescription: One of Naj's custom PC builds.

title: XPS9570-Opencore-IntelWifi
description: An OpenCore EFI configuration for the Dell XPS 15 9570 with Intel WiFi, enabling macOS installation and optimization.
achievements: Provided a tailored EFI folder for macOS installation.
Included necessary ACPI patches and kexts for hardware functionality.
Facilitated a seamless macOS experience on non-Apple hardware.
additionalNotes: No longer updated; users are directed to alternative repositories for continued support.

title: Mobile App Development Projects
description: A collection of mobile applications developed using C# and Xamarin.Forms.
achievements: Created various mobile apps, including AudioPlayer and JSONDemo
Gained experience in database integration for data persistence

title: Web Application Development Final Project

achievements: Responsive design implemented with Bootstrap
Dynamic content fetching from external APIs
additionalNotes: Certain features may be limited due to removed API keys. Application is no longer deployed.

title: Movie Center
description: A Java-based application developed by my team Aviato for managing and viewing movie collections.
achievements: Developed a functional GUI for movie management
Implemented features for adding, viewing, and organizing movies

title: Checklist
description: A desktop application developed using Java Swing to provide users with a simple and intuitive interface for creating and managing checklists.
achievements: Designed a user-friendly interface for task management.
Implemented basic file operations for saving and loading checklists.
Gained experience in desktop application development with Java.

title: Java Projects Repository

achievements: Developed multiple applications, including a Barcode Encoder and Class Generator.
Applied object-oriented programming principles effectively.
